title: Glowing Torches
description: This resource pack recreates the glowing outline in the new redstone torch model for all torches. As well as backporting the redstone torch model to older versions.
body:
# ✨ Glowing Torches / Consistent Torches ✨

> ***This resource pack recreates the glowing outline on the new redstone torch models for all other vanilla torches, including soul torches. This makes it more consistent with the new redstone torch and makes torches look more visually appealing.*** 

## ✅ Resource Pack: ON ✅
![After: (all torches have glowing outline)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b38b1c7b15e20e706cc00a530b49b4dd69bfb785.png)

## ❌ Resource Pack: OFF ❌
![Before (no glowy outline)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ee807d0125ac47d634d3893aec617361404bd18.png)

### To Note:
> This also backports all the torch models including the new redstone one to older versions before the new model was added.

### Credit
> Feel free to add these models to your packs, all I ask is for credit. Can call me JustSap or Sugi Hitori
And Mojang if you see this, also feel free to add this to the vanilla game.
